issue_title: Unknown error loading NuxtTurnstile in the page
issue_body_preview:
### 🐛 The bug

Hello,
Thank you for your work on this module!

1. I have a problem when I load `NuxtTurnstile` in my login page, I had to use the technique described in this issue (https://github.com/nuxt-modules/turnstile/issues/250#issuecomment-1869102103) otherwise it wouldn't load at all and
test_description_zh: 在登录页面中加载 NuxtTurnstile 组件，观察 Turnstile 验证码组件是否能正常渲染和显示在页面上。
expected_result_zh: NuxtTurnstile 组件应能正常加载并在页面上渲染出 Cloudflare Turnstile 验证码挑战框，无报错且无需使用额外的 workaround 即可正常显示。
